title: centaurea limbata subsp. geresensis
intro: Centaurea limbata subsp. geresensis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, known for its beautiful yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea limbata subsp. geresensis include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of benefits and potential side effects.
